tools.name: check_trust
tools.description: Look up the trust score for any MCP server by URL or npm package name. Returns score, grade, findings summary, and certification status.

tools.name: scan_server
tools.description: Trigger a live trust scan of an HTTP or HTTPS MCP server. Returns trust score, grade, and security findings.

tools.name: search_registry
tools.description: Search the CraftedTrust registry overlay for indexed MCP packages and servers. Filter by grade, certification, or scan type.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get CraftedTrust ecosystem statistics: total indexed servers, live verified count, average trust scores, flagged count, and more.
